coolant.label: Engine Overheating
coolant.advice: STOP DRIVING IMMEDIATELY. Allow engine to cool and check coolant level.

voltage.label: Battery/Charging Issue
voltage.advice: Check battery terminals for corrosion or have the alternator tested.

ltft.label: Fuel System Imbalance
ltft.advice: Potential vacuum leak or fuel injector issue. Inspect intake system.

stft.label: Fuel System Imbalance
stft.advice: Check air filter and oxygen sensors.

load.label: Excessive Engine Load
load.advice: Reduce speed and avoid heavy acceleration or reduce the AC blower speed. Possible engine strain.

intake_temp.label: High Intake Temp
intake_temp.advice: Check air intake for obstructions or heat soak issues.

cat_temp.label: Catalytic Overheating
cat_temp.advice: Engine may be running too high. Inspect spark plugs and injectors.

fuel_level.label: Low Fuel Level
fuel_level.advice: Refuel as soon as possible to avoid fuel pump damage.

equiv_ratio.label: Abnormal Air-Fuel Ratio
equiv_ratio.advice: System cannot maintain stable fuel mixture. Check MAF sensor.
